reachability_artifacts: real-binary assembled-journey-v1 record covering cold start, retry/fresh verify, signal/restart, notification replay, 360px browser observation, authenticated exactly-once control, release readiness, and human/delegated merge behavior

effort_complexity.rationale: See spec.json; implementer must confirm the complete real-binary fixture and merge-authority design against live code before design review.

release_benefit: A SwornAgent operator can trust a recoverable autonomous release loop, receive durable attention pages, and monitor or safely control it from a mobile web board.

positive_scenarios: The real binary retries a failed verification, assembles the verified release, and pauses ready for a human merge by default.
A valid standing merge delegation lets the scheduler use the same gated native merge exactly once.
A phone-sized browser follows live state and submits one authenticated exactly-once control.
A failed notification is replayed after recovery without blocking the loop.
negative_scenarios: Signal cancellation cannot leave a child running or create an optimistic PASS.
Absent, expired, revoked, or target-mismatched merge delegation cannot move the integration branch.
Stale/replayed remote commands cannot overwrite or repeat a newer operation.
The assembled evidence rejects missing proof, secrets, payload bodies, and absolute paths.
validation.benefit_hypothesis: One real assembled journey turns autonomous operation from a collection of green components into a product guarantee an operator can observe and trust.

design_decisions.choice: Keep ready_to_merge as the autonomous default and require a distinct scoped standing delegation for automatic integration merge.
options: human default with explicit standing delegation
design_decisions.rationale: This preserves release authority while supporting genuine unattended operation where it has been deliberately delegated.

design_decisions.choice: Make one native operation own both release gates and the integration-branch mutation.
options: retain separate gate-only and merge-only paths
rename native command to readiness check only
design_decisions.rationale: No default path currently proves both halves; unification makes exit 0 mean the documented mutation occurred.
